title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at REA India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at REA India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? REA India in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About REA India:
REA India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with REA India!
